description:
**Milestone:** Calendar and Todo Sync

Create Automerge document (doc:calendar) storing calendar events. Events sync across all instances so deadlines, ceremonies, and milestones are visible everywhere. Integrates with existing CalendarService and MCP calendar tools. Calendar is a shared resource — any instance can create/edit/delete events.

**Files to Modify:**
- libs/crdt/src/documents.ts
- libs/types/src/calendar.ts
- apps/server/src/services/calendar-service.ts
- apps/server/src/services/crdt-sync-service.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] doc:calendar CRDT document syncs across all instances
- [ ] Events created on any instance appear on all peers
- [ ] Existing MCP calendar tools work through CRDT layer when hivemind active
- [ ] Ceremony events auto-created when CeremonySchedulerService fires
- [ ] Milestone/project deadline events sync with project data
- [ ] Backward compatible: works without CRDT (falls back to filesystem)

**Complexity:** medium

**Guardrails:** If this phase involves new or changed behavior, include tests that verify correctness. If this phase adds, removes, or changes a user-facing feature, API endpoint, configuration option, or service, update the relevant documentation in `docs/` to reflect those changes.
